defaultValues.surpriseSubheadline: A tiny celebration page made with lots of love.
defaultValues.cardSectionSubheading: Each card hides a little message.
defaultValues.cardOneMessage: May your day be filled with laughter, love, and small moments that feel unforgettable.
defaultValues.cardTwoMessage: I hope this year brings calm, confidence, good surprises, and people who cheer for you loudly.
defaultValues.cardThreeMessage: You deserve joy that feels easy, memories that stay warm, and a year that treats you gently.
defaultValues.letterBody:
Happy Birthday to someone who makes life feel softer, brighter, and a little more fun.

I hope this year gives you more peace, more confidence, and more moments that remind you how loved you are.

You deserve good people, beautiful memories, and the kind of happiness that stays.

defaultValues.coverDescription: I made this specially just for you, for moments when you're mad. Take a deep breath, read slowly, and check what I made for you \uD83D\uDC97.
defaultValues.letterBody: I'm sorry for the moments I hurt you. You mean everything to me — and I just want your smile back. \uD83D\uDC97
defaultValues.letterSignature: With all my love — Your Madam Ji\uD83D\uDC8C
defaultValues.thankYouBody: I hope this little space made you smile. You are my favorite part of every day — always. \uD83D\uDC97
defaultValues.thankYouFooterLine: made with \uD83D\uDC97 and sparkles — forever yours ✨

defaultValues.introMessageOne: Hey Madam Jii. It's your day to shine!
defaultValues.introMessageTwo: I've set up something super vibrant just for you...
defaultValues.introMessageThree: Remember, you light up every room you enter!
defaultValues.songPromptMessage: I've curated a special song just for you. Ready to listen?
defaultValues.cakeInstructionText: Light the candles by clicking on them and drag down to cut the cake!
defaultValues.galleryPhotoOneCaption: Happy Birthday to the one who knows all my secrets and still chooses to stay! Here's to another year of laughter, chaos, and making memories.
defaultValues.galleryPhotoTwoCaption: To my partner-in-crime, my therapist, and my biggest cheerleader. Happy birthday, queen! The world shines brighter with you in it.
defaultValues.galleryPhotoThreeCaption: Cheers to you on your special day! Life's an adventure, and I'm glad I get to navigate it with you by my side.
defaultValues.galleryContinueButtonLabel: I wrote something special for you
defaultValues.finalBody: Thanks for coming into my life, and making it better with your presence.

defaultValues.photoOneCaption: Happy Birthday to someone who makes moments brighter!

defaultValues.landingSubtitle: Today is all about celebrating the most amazing person in my world. I've created something magical just for you on your special day...
defaultValues.landingFooter: Made with endless love for your special day \uD83D\uDC95
defaultValues.letterSectionSubtitle: From my heart to the birthday queen
defaultValues.letterBody:
Today marks another year of your incredible existence, and I couldn't be more grateful to celebrate it with you.

You bring so much joy, laughter, and love into this world - and into my life. You deserve all the magic, all the dreams, and all the love this world has to offer. 💕
defaultValues.letterEnvelopeHint: Click to open your birthday surprise
defaultValues.cakeSubheading: Make your birthday wish come true!
defaultValues.cakeInstructions: Draw a line across the middle of the cake to cut it ✂️
defaultValues.cakeCuttingPrompt: Cut your birthday cake, birthday girl! \uD83D\uDD2A
defaultValues.cakeWishPrompt: Close your eyes and make your birthday wish! \uD83C\uDF1F
defaultValues.cakeWishInstructions: Think of something wonderful for your new year!
defaultValues.cakeCelebrationMessage: May this year bring you everything your heart desires! ✨
defaultValues.playlistSubheading: Songs to celebrate your special day
defaultValues.songOneCaption: Here's to making this year unforgettable \uD83C\uDF1F
defaultValues.songTwoCaption: Because today is all about YOU, queen! \uD83D\uDC51
defaultValues.songThreeCaption: Every beat celebrates your beautiful heart \uD83D\uDC96
defaultValues.cardsSubheading: Click each card to reveal a birthday message!
defaultValues.cardsProgressTemplate: {{count}} of {{total}} birthday wishes unlocked! Keep going \uD83C\uDF89
defaultValues.cardsPopupMessage: Each wish carries my love and hopes for your amazing new year ahead. ✨
defaultValues.cardsPopupStayLabel: Enjoy the wishes a bit longer
defaultValues.cardOneMessage: Happy Birthday to the girl who makes every day feel like a celebration! \uD83C\uDF89\uD83D\uDC95
defaultValues.cardTwoMessage: Another year of being absolutely incredible, beautiful, and perfect just the way you are! ✨
defaultValues.cardThreeMessage: May this new year bring you endless joy, love, and all the dreams your heart desires! \uD83C\uDF1F\uD83D\uDC96
defaultValues.finalPageSubtitle: A special message sealed with love \uD83D\uDC95
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphOne: May this new year bring you everything your heart desires and more joy than you can imagine.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphTwo: Happy Birthday, my love. You deserve the world and so much more. \uD83C\uDF82✨
defaultValues.finalSealingNote: Sealing will complete your birthday experience.

sections.label: Final Letter
sections.description: Final wrap-up message and sealed state copy.

defaultValues.landingSubtitle: I wanted to do a tiny something because you mean a lot to me.
defaultValues.landingFooter: Made with love (and a little courage) \uD83D\uDC95
defaultValues.letterBody:
I may have messed up a bit. I never meant to hurt you, sometimes my brain trips over my heart. What I do know for sure is how much you matter to me.

You're incredibly special to me, and I hate the idea of being the reason you felt anything less than loved.

Thank you for being you. I hope this makes you smile, even just a little.
defaultValues.playlistHeading: Some Songs That Reminded Me of You
defaultValues.cardsHeading: Little Things I Messed Up (But Care About)
defaultValues.cardOneFront: I may have been a little dumb sometimes \uD83E\uDD72
defaultValues.cardOneBackText: No bad intentions, just bad timing. I'm working on it.
defaultValues.cardTwoBackText: Even when you're upset, you're still my favorite person.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphOne: I might mess up sometimes, but my feelings for you are always real.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphTwo: Thank you for your patience, your heart, and being you.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphThree: I hope this reminded you how important you are to me.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphFour: You matter more to me than I know how to say.
defaultValues.finalLetterParagraphFive: This is me, choosing you. Always.

defaultValues.introMessage: Today is all about you. I made this little page to remind you how special you are.
defaultValues.letterBody:
Happy Birthday to someone who makes everything feel warmer and brighter.

I hope this year brings you peace, confidence, and moments that remind you how loved you are.

You deserve beautiful memories and the kind of happiness that stays.

love-note.name: Love Note
love-note.description: Lifetime validity + Make it in just 30 seconds + live beautiful QR Code. A free love microsite with a message reveal, reasons-I-love-you cards, a photo, and a love letter.

sections.label: Intro
sections.description: Opening headline and message.

sections.label: Reasons I Love You
sections.description: Three things you appreciate about them.

sections.label: Photo
sections.description: A special photo of you two.

sections.label: Love Letter
sections.description: Your heartfelt letter.

defaultValues.headline: A little something for you
defaultValues.introMessage: I wanted to put into words what you mean to me. So here's a tiny corner of the internet, just for you.
defaultValues.reasonOneBody: The way you make people feel seen and heard — it's rare and beautiful.
defaultValues.reasonTwoBody: Even on the hardest days, you find a way to make everything lighter.
defaultValues.reasonThreeBody: You give people space to grow, and that quiet strength means more than you know.
defaultValues.letterBody:
I don't say this enough, but you matter to me — more than I can put into words.

Thank you for being patient, for showing up, for being exactly who you are.

You make my world softer, brighter, and a little more magical every single day.

sections.label: Introduction
sections.description: The opening screen your recipient sees first.

fields.label: Intro GIF / image
fields.helperText: Upload a GIF or image (max 2 MB). Shown on the intro screen, inside the gift on the reveal, and next to the letter.

sections.label: Flower & Message
sections.description: Pick a flower and write a special message that appears with it.

sections.label: Letter
sections.description: A heartfelt closing letter.

defaultValues.heroMessage: Today is yours. A little corner of the internet — built just to say thanks for every lesson you taught me, every early morning you never complained about, and every quiet sacrifice I only understand now. Stay a while, Dad.
defaultValues.songCaption: press play — this one always reminds me of long drives with you behind the wheel.
defaultValues.gallerySubtitle: a few moments i never want to forget ♡
defaultValues.galleryPhoto1Caption: the way you make everything feel steady — i hope you always know it.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto2Caption: every lesson and every dad-joke turned out to be the best memory.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto3Caption: thank you for being my first hero, and my steadiest one.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto4Caption: i'm lucky i get to call you my dad.
defaultValues.bouquetTitle: three things i never said out loud
defaultValues.bouquetSubtitle: tap each card — there's a note inside ✦
defaultValues.memory1Body: you've worked for me, worried for me, and shown up for me more times than i can count. i noticed every single one.
defaultValues.memory2Label: you taught me the important stuff
defaultValues.memory2Body: how to stay calm, keep my word, and fix what i can on my own. half of who i am is just you, passed down.
defaultValues.memory3Body: watching you handle life made it less scary to grow up. i look up to you more than i'd ever admit out loud.
defaultValues.gratitudeMessage: for the early mornings, the steady advice, the bad jokes, and the rare-but-perfect serious talks. for being the constant. happy father's day — you deserve every bit of this and more.
defaultValues.letterBody:
i'm not great at this — saying soft stuff to your face — so i made you a tiny page instead. a song, our pictures, and a few things i actually mean.

thank you for being the steadiest, most dependable person in my corner. for the early mornings, the long days at work, and every time you put us first without ever making a thing of it.

i hope today feels like yours. i hope you get to rest, the chai is exactly how you like it, and you laugh at least once at your own joke. and i hope you know — even when i don't say it — i'm so proud to be yours.

fields.helperText: How you sign off — your name, a nickname, or a phrase.

defaultValues.headline: Just thinking of you
defaultValues.introMessage: No reason. No occasion. Just a tiny corner of the internet I made — to remind you that you are someone's favourite thought today.
defaultValues.gateHeadline: a tiny puzzle, then a tiny surprise
defaultValues.gateSubheadline: fill the empty square with a heart to keep going ♡
defaultValues.reason1: your laugh — it makes ordinary days bloom.
defaultValues.reason2: the way you care, even on your hard days.
defaultValues.reason3: you, exactly the way you are. nothing to fix.
defaultValues.promiseMessage: May good things find you softly today. May you feel held, even from far away. And may you remember — you are very, very loved.
defaultValues.letterBody:
I was sitting somewhere ordinary when I thought of you, and the day got a little brighter.

You don't have to do anything to be special. You already are. The way you talk, the way you care, the small gentle things you do without even noticing — they all matter. They matter to me.

Keep this page somewhere in your pocket. On hard days, come back. I'll still think you're wonderful.
defaultValues.letterClosing: With a whole lot of warm,

defaultValues.heroMessage: Today is yours. A little corner of the internet — built just to say thanks for every inside joke we still laugh about, every secret we kept, and every time you had my back. Stay a while, bestie.
defaultValues.songCaption: press play — this one always reminds me of you and our long drives.
defaultValues.gallerySubtitle: a few moments i never want to forget ♡
defaultValues.galleryPhoto1Caption: the way you laugh at your own jokes — i hope you never stop.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto2Caption: every dumb adventure with you turned out to be the best memory.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto3Caption: thank you for being my first friend, and the loudest one.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto4Caption: i'm lucky i get to call you my best friend.
defaultValues.bouquetTitle: three things i never said out loud
defaultValues.bouquetSubtitle: tap each card — there's a note inside ✦
defaultValues.memory1Body: you've covered for me, fought for me, and shown up for me more times than i can count. i noticed every single one.
defaultValues.memory2Label: you make me laugh harder than anyone
defaultValues.memory2Body: no one roasts me like you. no one cheers me up like you either. i'd pick our brand of nonsense any day.
defaultValues.memory3Body: watching you figure life out made it less scary to try. i look up to you more than i'd ever admit out loud.
defaultValues.gratitudeMessage: for the laughs, the comebacks, the bad jokes, and the rare-but-perfect serious talks. for being the constant. happy best friend's day — you deserve every bit of this and more.
defaultValues.letterBody:
i'm not great at this — saying soft stuff to your face — so i made you a tiny page instead. a song, our pictures, and a few things i actually mean.

thank you for being the loudest, most chaotic, most reliable person in my corner. for the late-night plans, the random calls, and every time you pretended not to notice i was a mess.

i hope today feels like yours. i hope someone gets the order right, the wifi doesn't drop, and you laugh at least once for no reason. and i hope you know — even when i don't say it — i'm so glad you're my best friend.

fields.label: Your name (footer)

fields.label: Footer prefix
fields.helperText: Text shown before your name at the bottom (e.g. 'with love').

defaultValues.heroMessage: Today is yours. A whole little garden of wishes — for every laugh we've shared, every silly moment, and every reason you make the world brighter. Pause for a beat, and let me say it properly.
defaultValues.songCaption: press play — i picked this one because it always reminds me of you.
defaultValues.gallerySubtitle: a few of my favourite moments with you ♡
defaultValues.galleryPhoto1Caption: the way you smile in every photo — i hope you know it lights up the room.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto2Caption: ordinary days with you have always been my favourite ones.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto3Caption: thank you for showing up — for everything, every time.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto4Caption: i'm so lucky i get to do life alongside you.
defaultValues.bouquetTitle: a tiny bouquet of birthday wishes
defaultValues.bouquetSubtitle: pick each flower — there's a little wish inside ♡
defaultValues.memory1Body: your laugh is one of those sounds that just makes a room feel warmer. wishing you a year full of the kind of moments that bring it out again and again.
defaultValues.memory2Body: you remember the small things — the worry from a Tuesday, the random text on a hard day. it always feels like being seen, not just heard. wishing you the same softness back this year.
defaultValues.memory3Body: may this year be kinder than the last. may every new chapter bring you good food, better naps, and people who love you the way you deserve.
defaultValues.gratitudeMessage: thank you for being you — for the patience, the late-night talks, the silly inside jokes. i hope today feels as gentle and special as you've always made my days feel.
defaultValues.letterBody:
there's no card big enough for everything i'd like to say, so i made you a little garden — with a song, our pictures, and a few of my favourite wishes for the year ahead.

thank you for the small and unseen things — the way you check in, the jokes only we get, the quiet patience when i'm being too much. i noticed. i still notice.

i hope today you feel celebrated. i hope you eat something delicious that you didn't have to make, and someone tells you you're loved (you are). most of all, i hope this year ahead feels — for one whole trip around the sun — exactly the way you've always made me feel: completely, completely loved.

defaultValues.heroMessage: Today is yours. A little corner of the internet — built just to say thanks for every fight we laughed about later, every secret we kept, and every time you had my back. Stay a while, big/little brother.
defaultValues.songCaption: press play — this one always reminds me of you and our long drives.
defaultValues.gallerySubtitle: a few moments i never want to forget ♡
defaultValues.galleryPhoto1Caption: the way you laugh at your own jokes — i hope you never stop.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto2Caption: every dumb adventure with you turned out to be the best memory.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto3Caption: thank you for being my first friend, and the loudest one.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto4Caption: i'm lucky i get to call you my brother.
defaultValues.bouquetTitle: three things i never said out loud
defaultValues.bouquetSubtitle: tap each card — there's a note inside ✦
defaultValues.memory1Body: you've covered for me, fought for me, and shown up for me more times than i can count. i noticed every single one.
defaultValues.memory2Label: you make me laugh harder than anyone
defaultValues.memory2Body: no one roasts me like you. no one cheers me up like you either. i'd pick our brand of nonsense any day.
defaultValues.memory3Body: watching you figure life out made it less scary to try. i look up to you more than i'd ever admit out loud.
defaultValues.gratitudeMessage: for the fights, the comebacks, the bad jokes, and the rare-but-perfect serious talks. for being the constant. happy brother's day — you deserve every bit of this and more.
defaultValues.letterBody:
i'm not great at this — saying soft stuff to your face — so i made you a tiny page instead. a song, our pictures, and a few things i actually mean.

thank you for being the loudest, most chaotic, most reliable person in my corner. for the late-night plans, the random calls, and every time you pretended not to notice i was a mess.

i hope today feels like yours. i hope someone gets the order right, the wifi doesn't drop, and you laugh at least once for no reason. and i hope you know — even when i don't say it — i'm so glad you're my brother.

defaultValues.heroMessage: Today is yours. A little corner of the internet — built just to say thanks for every lesson you taught me, every early morning you never complained about, and every quiet sacrifice I only understand now. Stay a while, Dad.
defaultValues.songCaption: press play — this one always reminds me of long drives with you behind the wheel.
defaultValues.gallerySubtitle: a few moments i never want to forget ♡
defaultValues.galleryPhoto1Caption: the way you make everything feel steady — i hope you always know it.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto2Caption: every lesson and every dad-joke turned out to be the best memory.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto3Caption: thank you for being my first hero, and my steadiest one.
defaultValues.galleryPhoto4Caption: i'm lucky i get to call you my dad.
defaultValues.bouquetTitle: three things i never said out loud
defaultValues.bouquetSubtitle: tap each card — there's a note inside ✦
defaultValues.memory1Body: you've worked for me, worried for me, and shown up for me more times than i can count. i noticed every single one.
defaultValues.memory2Label: you taught me the important stuff
defaultValues.memory2Body: how to stay calm, keep my word, and fix what i can on my own. half of who i am is just you, passed down.
defaultValues.memory3Body: watching you handle life made it less scary to grow up. i look up to you more than i'd ever admit out loud.
defaultValues.gratitudeMessage: for the early mornings, the steady advice, the bad jokes, and the rare-but-perfect serious talks. for being the constant. happy father's day — you deserve every bit of this and more.
defaultValues.letterBody:
i'm not great at this — saying soft stuff to your face — so i made you a tiny page instead. a song, our pictures, and a few things i actually mean.

thank you for being the steadiest, most dependable person in my corner. for the early mornings, the long days at work, and every time you put us first without ever making a thing of it.

i hope today feels like yours. i hope you get to rest, the chai is exactly how you like it, and you laugh at least once at your own joke. and i hope you know — even when i don't say it — i'm so proud to be yours.

defaultValues.countdownEyebrow: until the next excuse to celebrate you
defaultValues.countdownSubtitle: not that I need an excuse, but still
defaultValues.storyEyebrow: a few things I have noticed
defaultValues.storyTitle: Less than a year in and somehow already full of moments worth keeping.
defaultValues.storyCardOneText: Somehow comfortable and exciting at the same time. That is a rare combination and I do not take it for granted.
defaultValues.storyCardTwoText: The small stuff keeps adding up. Random conversations. Stupid jokes. The moments that do not make sense to screenshot but stick anyway.
defaultValues.storyCardThreeText: Like things are heading somewhere good. I do not know exactly where. But I am not in a rush because right now is already pretty great.
defaultValues.archiveTitle: Less than a year of memories and already too many good ones to pick a favourite.
defaultValues.archiveMainCopy: scroll through and watch the little moments drift by
defaultValues.momentsTitle: A few snapshots tucked in here — nothing dramatic, just us.
defaultValues.momentsPhotoTwoTitle: a little keepsake from somewhere in the middle
defaultValues.momentsPhotoThreeTitle: the part that ties it all together
defaultValues.playlistTitle: Curated for the occasion. Play one. Light something. Enjoy the moment.
defaultValues.songOneCaption: the one that feels the most like right now
defaultValues.songTwoCaption: for the slower, quieter parts of tonight
defaultValues.songThreeCaption: this one hits different when you actually mean it
defaultValues.noteParagraphOne: Less than a year feels too short to describe what this has already been. But here we are, and it is already more than I expected — in the best possible way.
defaultValues.noteParagraphTwo: Thank you for the laughs, the long conversations, the random voice notes, and every moment that made me think okay yeah, this is a good thing. I did not say it enough out loud so I put it in a website. Very normal.
defaultValues.noteParagraphThree: I do not know exactly what comes next. But I am really glad we are figuring it out together. Here is to whatever is ahead — and to the fact that we have barely even started.

sections.label: Couple & Date
sections.description: Names, wedding date, and venue details.

fields.helperText: Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss

sections.label: Venue

sections.label: Invitation
sections.description: Invitation section text and quote.

sections.label: Our Story
sections.description: Four story chapters with photos and quotes.

sections.label: Gallery
sections.description: Seven gallery images in a masonry grid.

sections.label: Event Details
sections.description: Ceremony, reception, and after-party info.

sections.label: Vision & Vibes
sections.description: The evening's vision statement.

sections.label: Dinner Menu
sections.description: Menu categories and caterer info.

sections.label: Footer & FAQ
sections.description: Closing message and contact email.

defaultValues.storyChapter1Desc: We met at a friend's garden party on a warm spring evening. Pinak spilled chai on Ana's favorite book, and somehow, that clumsy moment became the start of something beautiful.
defaultValues.storyChapter2Desc: Autumn brought long walks, shared dreams, and the realization that we had found something rare. Between cozy dinners and endless conversations, every moment felt like home.
defaultValues.storyChapter3Desc: A candlelit evening in Tuscany became the night Pinak knew he'd found his forever person. Under the Italian sky, we promised to explore the world together.
defaultValues.storyChapter3Quote: The world is ours to explore.
defaultValues.visionText: The vision for the night is simple: all of our most beloved people in one room that happens to have a gorgeous garden, banger music, and an open-bar.
defaultValues.dinnerDescription: We are working with our caterers to finalize a delicious South Asian–fusion menu for the evening.
defaultValues.startersItems:
Paneer Tikka Skewers
Deconstructed Samosa Chaat
Lavender-Infused Bruschetta
defaultValues.mainsItems:
Butter Chicken with Saffron Rice
Mushroom Risotto with Truffle Oil
Grilled Lamb Chops with Mint Chutney
defaultValues.dessertsItems:
Gulab Jamun Cheesecake
Rose & Pistachio Kulfi
Chocolate Fondant with Cardamom
defaultValues.footerMessage: We are so grateful for each and every one of you. Your love, support, and friendship mean the world to us. We cannot wait to celebrate this beautiful journey with you.

sections.label: Lock Screen
sections.description: The opening padlock screen. Set the password your recipient must type to unlock the site.

fields.label: Secret password
fields.helperText: Not case-sensitive. This is what your recipient types to unlock the site.

sections.label: Letter & Music
sections.description: The letter that appears after unlocking, with an attached music player. The song keeps playing as the visitor moves through the other pages.

fields.label: Letter body
fields.helperText: Separate paragraphs with a blank line.

sections.label: Photo Gallery
sections.description: Up to four photos with captions.

sections.label: Animated Notes
sections.description: Colourful animated sticky notes — the final page.

fields.label: Closing animation (GIF)
fields.helperText: The animated GIF shown above the closing line on the final page.

defaultValues.lockTitle: A little something is locked away for you
defaultValues.lockSubtitle: Type the secret word to open it \uD83D\uDD12
defaultValues.lockHint: Hint: the three words I say most
defaultValues.lockErrorText: Hmm, that's not it. Try again, cutie!
defaultValues.letterBody:
I built this tiny little corner of the internet just for you. Press play on the song below — it's the one that always makes me think of you — and let it follow you around while you explore.

There is no big occasion. I just wanted to remind you, in the softest way I know how, that you are deeply, ridiculously loved.

Scroll on. There are photos and little notes waiting.
defaultValues.galleryPhotoTwoCaption: you, laughing at your own joke
defaultValues.galleryPhotoThreeCaption: a tiny moment I never want to forget
defaultValues.notesTitle: Sticky notes from me to you
defaultValues.noteOne: You are my favourite hello and my hardest goodbye.
defaultValues.noteTwo: Your smile fixes days you didn't even break.
defaultValues.noteThree: I'd choose you. Every time. In every version of this.
defaultValues.noteFour: Thank you for being exactly, wonderfully you.
defaultValues.noteFive: P.S. the song is still playing. So is my heart \uD83E\uDEF6
